posts.text: Terms such as “left behind” have become contorted and no more so than in Makerfield, where a significant by-election is coming. If the constituency is indeed left behind, so is the rest of Britain https://www.economist.com/britain/2026/05/21/hate-labour-vote-labour?taid=6a1337f6a88c290001713ce6&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text:
There is a near-perfect correlation between US oil prices and US CPI inflation, as shown in our below analysis.

Oil prices have averaged near $100/barrel since March 6th, or 79 days.

The longer this persists, the more inflation we will see.

Asset owners are the only winners.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
